archived.description: Indicates that the field has been soft-deleted by the doctor and will not be used in future notes
archived.title: Archived

clinical_note_template.description: ID of the `/api/clinical_note_templates` object that the field belongs to
clinical_note_template.title: Clinical note template

required.description: Indicates that a note should not be locked unless a value is provided for this field
required.title: Required

allowed_values.description: Value options the field type relies on if applicable, otherwise it will be an empty array
allowed_values.title: Allowed values
